title: Dekton Geckogrip 44pc Clear Bumper Set Assorted - Clear Rubber Feet| Adhesive Bumper Pads| Self Stick Bumpers| Sound Dampening Door Bumper| Cabinet Buffer Pads| Transparent Design| Strong Hold
features: Premium Clear Rubber Construction: The Dekton Geckogrip Bumper Set features high-quality clear rubber feet that provide excellent durability and functionality. These bumpers are designed to be nearly invisible, blending seamlessly with any surface while offering superior protection and noise reduction.

Effective Sound Dampening: Each bumper pad is engineered to absorb and dampen sound, making them ideal for use on doors, cabinets, and furniture. They help prevent the annoying clatter and rattling of doors and drawers, creating a quieter and more peaceful environment in your home or office.

Protective Buffer for Surfaces: These bumpers act as a protective barrier between surfaces, preventing scratches, dents, and damage from impacts. Whether used on cabinet doors, furniture legs, or appliances, they help preserve the appearance and integrity of your belongings.

Clear and Discreet Design: The transparent design of these bumpers makes them virtually invisible once applied, maintaining the aesthetic of your furniture and fixtures. They blend seamlessly with any surface, providing protection without compromising on style.

Strong Adhesive Hold: Dekton Geckogrip 2pc Clear Bumper Set Each bumper pad is equipped with a strong, self-stick adhesive backing. This ensures that the bumpers remain securely in place, providing reliable protection and preventing slippage or movement.
description: Product Description The Dekton Geckogrip 44pc Clear Bumper Set is a versatile and practical solution for protecting your surfaces and reducing noise in a variety of settings. This assorted set includes clear rubber feet and adhesive bumper pads designed to offer superior cushioning and sound dampening. Ideal for use on doors, cabinets, and other surfaces, these self-stick bumpers effectively absorb shocks and vibrations, reducing the impact and noise caused by slamming or bumping. The transparent design of these bumpers ensures they blend seamlessly with any decor, providing a discreet yet effective barrier between surfaces. Each bumper in the set is crafted from high-quality, durable rubber that provides a strong hold and long-lasting performance. The adhesive backing is designed for easy application and strong adhesion, making it simple to install the bumpers exactly where you need them without the hassle of tools or complicated setups. The clear rubber feet not only prevent scratches and damage to your furniture and walls but also help maintain a clean, unobtrusive look. The Dekton Geckogrip Clear Bumper Set is perfect for a wide range of applications, including protecting your cabinets from damage, reducing noise from door slams, and providing cushioning for delicate surfaces. With 44 pieces in assorted sizes and shapes, you'll have the right bumper for every application, ensuring comprehensive protection and sound dampening throughout your space. Safety Warning Avoid placing bumpers on walking paths to prevent tripping hazards. Remove bumpers carefully to avoid damage to surfaces and potential residue. Always follow manufacturer's instructions for safe usage and installation.
